The '''''Braha'tok''''' was a [[Braha'tok-class gunship/Legends|''Braha'tok''-class gunship]] under the [[Commander/Legends|command]] of [[Kiles L'toth]] in the [[Dornean Navy]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dornea/Legends|Dornea]] loaned the ''Braha'tok''—along with its sister [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Torktarak]]''—to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] for its [[Battle of Endor/Legends|attack]] on the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] [[Battle station/Legends|battle station]] above the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]].

During the battle, the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] was destroyed by the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]], and, trying to save survivors, L'toth moved the ''Braha'tok'' into a defensive formation to cover rescue craft. While providing cover, the ''Braha'tok'' engaged and destroyed the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] [[Eminence (Carrack-class)|''Eminence'']] with the help of the ''Torktarak''. However, the ''Braha'tok'' took extensive damage during the battle and, following the Alliance's eventual victory, was shipped back to Dornea to serve as a war [[Museum/Legends|museum]].

==Description==
Manufactured by the [[Dornean Braha'ket Fleetworks Conglomerate/Legends|Dornean Braha'ket Fleetworks Conglomerate]], the ''Braha'tok'' was a [[Braha'tok-class gunship/Legends|''Braha'tok''-class gunship]] in the [[Dornean Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The ''Braha'tok'' was ninety [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and was equipped with eight double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and eight [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]. It possessed limited [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] space and lacked [[Soldier/Legends|ground troop]] complement. The ship came equipped with [[Targeting computer/Legends|fire control]], maneuvering, and command capabilities, all of which were centralized in the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]].<ref name="db" /> The ''Braha'tok'' was also equipped with [[Engine/Legends|engines]] that were capable of making the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="rotj" />

==History==
[[File:BrahatokClassGunship-Databank.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A ''Braha'tok''-class gunship]]
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] asked [[Dornea/Legends|Dornea]]—which had been fighting its own [[Dornea's war against the Empire|private war]] against the Empire for [[Standard year/Legends|years]]—for [[Battleship/Legends|battleships]] to assist them in their upcoming [[Battle of Endor/Legends|assault]] on the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]],<ref name="db" /> an Imperial [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] that could destroy an entire [[Planet/Legends|planet]], which was still under construction while orbiting the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]].<ref name="rotj" /> The [[Dornean/Legends|Dorneans]] decided to send the ''Braha'tok'' along with its sister [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Torktarak]]'', under the [[Commander/Legends|command]] of [[Kiles L'toth]] and [[Etahn A'baht]], respectively. Since the ''Braha'tok''-class [[Gunship/Legends|gunships]] had not been outside of the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] surrounding Dornea before 4 ABY, and to avoid arousing the suspicion of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], the Dornean government claimed that the two ships were undergoing a "shakedown cruise."<ref name="db" />

The ''Braha'tok'' and the ''Torktarak'' met up with the Alliance [[Fleet/Legends|Fleet]] orbiting [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], which was under the command of the [[Mon Calamari (language)/Legends|Mon Calamarian]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]. Both of the Braha'tok gunships left with the Alliance fleet for the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]].<ref name="db" /> However, when the Alliance fleet came out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] over Endor, they were caught in a trap devised by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The Alliance discovered that the [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]] protecting the second [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]], which was supposed to have been taken down by a [[Endor strike team/Legends|ground unit]] that had already landed on Endor, was still up. Also, the Alliance fleet was met by a large [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleet]] under the command of Admiral [[Firmus Piett/Legends|Firmus Piett]], which trapped them in the system.<ref name="rotj" />

The Alliance fleet engaged the Imperials, hoping the [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] would be taken down by the ground strike team before the Imperial fleet defeated them.<ref name="rotj" /> During the space battle, the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Liberty'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] was destroyed by the Death Star's [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]], which the Alliance hadn't known was functional. In order to provide cover for the rescue [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] picking up survivors, L'toth moved the ''Braha'tok'' into a defensive formation. While providing cover, the ''Braha'tok'' held off the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''–class cruiser]] [[Eminence (Carrack-class)|''Eminence'']], which was more than three times the size of the ''Braha'tok''. The ship took extensive damage while engaging the ''Eminence'', but the ''Braha'tok'' and the ''Torktarak'' were able to destroy the ''Eminence'' after the ''Torktarak'' attacked the Imperial warship from behind.<ref name="db" />

After the ''Eminence'' was destroyed, the ''Torktarak'' continued to provide cover for the damaged ''Braha'tok'' while it continued its search-and-rescue mission.<ref name="db" /> The Alliance fleet eventually destroyed the second Death Star and won the battle after the superweapon's shields were finally disabled by the ground team on Endor.<ref name="rotj" /> Following the battle, Ackbar wished to scuttle the severely damaged ''Braha'tok''. However, upon the insistence from the Dornean Navy, it was returned to Dornea to be converted into a war [[Museum/Legends|museum]].<ref name="db" />

==Commanders and crew==
The ''Braha'tok'' had a crew of seventy-five Dornean navy personnel under the command of Kiles L'toth. After the Battle of Endor, the ''Braha'tok''{{'s}} conversion into a war museum led to L'toth's retirement from the Dornean navy.<ref name="db" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Battle_of_Endor.jpg|thumb|right|180px|The ''Return of the Jedi'' ''Braha'tok''-class gunship, to the lower left of a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], during the Battle of Endor]]
The ''Braha'tok'' was created in [[Ello137]]'s winning entry in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] feature, "[[What's The Story?]]." The campaign allowed fans to provide the backstory for certain aspects of the saga; in this case, the ''Braha'tok''-class gunships. Originally, Ello137 intended the ship's name to be a mythical Dornean name, but was unable to fit it into the "flow" of his final entry.<ref name="blog">{{Blog|apocalypselater|16/comments|What's the Story, Ello137? Funny you should ask …}}</ref> The information on the ''Braha'tok'' from Ello137's entry was later used in the entry on the ''Braha'tok''-class gunship included in the reference book ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.

In [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], a ''Braha'tok''-class gunship appears in the background during the space battle over Endor. However, the gunship has never been identified as either the ''Braha'tok'' or the ''Torktarak''.
